questions.text: What's your approach to alcohol — do you drink socially, have a go-to drink, or steer clear entirely? Any preferences around beer, wine, cocktails, or spirits?

When you buy things, how important is it to you that a brand or company aligns with your values (fair trade, ethical labor, local production, etc.)? Is there a price point or product category where you care more about this?

What does your living space need to feel like 'home' to you? Are there specific decorative elements, colors, or vibes (minimalist, cozy, modern, etc.) that make a place feel right? Any must-have items you try to bring with you?
What kind of reading do you enjoy — fiction, non-fiction, both? Any favorite genres or authors? Do you prefer physical books, e-readers, or audiobooks?
What are your news and information habits — do you follow specific outlets, podcasts, newsletters, or influencers? Any sources you trust for tech news, world events, or just interesting reads?
